name: measurements-dashboard
description: Start backend, queue workers, and frontend with one command

scripts.start: concurrently -k -n server,reverb,gen1,gen2,def1,def2,def3,frontend -c blue,cyan,magenta,magenta,yellow,yellow,yellow,green "npm run backend:serve" "npm run backend:reverb" "npm run backend:generation" "npm run backend:generation" "npm run backend:default" "npm run backend:default" "npm run backend:default" "npm run frontend"
scripts.frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && npm run preview
